title: solanum lasiostylum
intro: Solanum lasiostylum is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Solanum lasiostylum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Solanum lasiostylum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion to be used as a herbal remedy, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
